summary: P2 Mobile Responsiveness testing completed successfully. All 10 backend tests passed (auth, notifications, health). Frontend: All pages (Login, Dashboard, SecuritySettings, NotaryDashboard, AdminDashboard, RequestNotarization, TransactionRoom) are responsive at 375px (mobile) and 1920px (desktop). Hamburger menu works at mobile breakpoint, notification bell is visible and functional on all dashboard pages, progress steps and tabs are properly responsive.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Navbar hamburger menu correctly uses md breakpoint (768px) with data-testid='mobile-menu-toggle'
Good: Dashboard header uses flex-wrap and sm: responsive utilities for proper mobile layout
Good: NotaryDashboard stats use 'grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-5' for proper mobile 2-column grid
Good: AdminDashboard stats use 'grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5' for responsive layout
Good: RequestNotarization progress steps are properly sized with sm: breakpoints
Good: TransactionRoom tabs use 'overflow-x-auto' for horizontal scrolling on mobile
Good: SecuritySettings header has responsive padding with 'px-4 sm:px-6'
Good: NotificationBell component is present on all dashboard pages (Dashboard, Security, Admin, Notary)
Good: Login card uses 'w-full max-w-md' with 'p-6 sm:p-8' for responsive padding
Good: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 7 pages tested responsive at both 375px and 1920px viewports)

context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) P2 Mobile responsiveness fully tested and working. 2) All pages responsive at 375px (mobile) and 1920px (desktop): Login, Dashboard, SecuritySettings, NotaryDashboard, AdminDashboard, RequestNotarization, TransactionRoom, Transactions list. 3) Hamburger menu (data-testid='mobile-menu-toggle') works at <768px width. 4) NotificationBell visible on: Dashboard, SecuritySettings, AdminDashboard, NotaryDashboard. 5) TransactionRoom tabs are horizontally scrollable on mobile (overflow-x-auto). 6) RequestNotarization progress steps properly sized at mobile. 7) Stats cards properly stack/grid on mobile. 8) PDF Preview button (data-testid='preview-pdf-btn') is integrated in RequestNotarization page - appears when PDF file selected.

login_page_responsiveness.desktop_1920px: WORKING - Full nav links visible, no hamburger

dashboard_responsiveness.mobile_375px: WORKING - Stats stack, buttons collapse to icons, notification bell works
dashboard_responsiveness.desktop_1920px: WORKING - Full layout with notification bell, security button visible

notary_dashboard_responsiveness.mobile_375px: WORKING - Stat cards 2-column grid, header responsive

admin_dashboard_responsiveness.desktop_1920px: WORKING - Full stats row, notification bell visible

request_notarization_responsiveness.mobile_375px: WORKING - Progress steps responsive, hamburger menu visible

security_settings_responsiveness.mobile_375px: WORKING - Header responsive with back button and notification bell
security_settings_responsiveness.desktop_1920px: WORKING - Full header with user info

transaction_room_responsiveness.mobile_375px: WORKING - Tabs horizontally scrollable, cards stack

notification_bell.AdminDashboard: WORKING - Visible between refresh and logout

pdf_preview_integration.RequestNotarization: Present - PDFPreview component imported and Preview button shows for PDF files
